what: Collect and Process Rain Gauge SMS Data
title: Collect and Process Rain Gauge SMS Data
text: smscollectr R package designed collection, parsing, export meteorological observations transmitted via SMS. built operational use within ANAM-BF (Agence Nationale de la Météorologie du Burkina Faso), field observers send daily measurements structured text messages central Google Sheet. Scope notice package purpose-built specific operational context ANAM-BF: fixed SMS formats, CLIDATA-compatible output schema, Google Sheets-based collection pipeline. general-purpose SMS parsing library. said, core functions deliberately modular can serve starting point adaptation networks, SMS formats, database targets minimal effort.

title: Collect and Process Rain Gauge SMS Data
text: Workflow Two SMS formats supported automatically detected: Format Gauge — rain gauge observations Format Agro — agrometeorological station observations parse_sms() returns named list two tibbles, one SMS format, making straightforward export dataset separately CLIDATA.

title: Collect and Process Rain Gauge SMS Data
text: Field observers send structured SMS messages shared phone number. Messages automatically forwarded Google Sheet. read_sms(): downloads sheet, validates SMS messages, repairs malformed gauge messages using fix_sms(), parses valid observations. function returns: $gauge $agro $bad $raw write_csv() exports CLIDATA-compatible CSV files. clean_sheet() clears Google Sheet successful import.

what: Attempt to fix a malformed SMS — fix_sms
title: Attempt to fix a malformed SMS — fix_sms
text: Extracts last valid line, cleans station ID, normalises rainfall value. Handles following cases: Missing comma ID date. Spaces station ID. Extra digits appended date field. Decimal point value (e.g. 1.0 -> 10). Comma decimal separator (e.g. 12,6 -> 126). Unit suffixes (e.g. 12mm -> 12). Hour annotations (e.g. 19h, de 1730 1830). Date-like patterns value field (e.g. 02/07/2026). "rain" mentions -> "0". Trace rainfall variants -> "TR". Date shift: date yesterday, shifts today.

title: Attempt to fix a malformed SMS — fix_sms
Attempt to fix a malformed SMS — fix_sms
text: x character vector SMS texts (possibly multi-line). gauge Logical. TRUE (default), fixes gauge SMS rules via is_gauge_sms(). FALSE, throws error non-gauge fixing yet implemented. sent_date Date(1). date message received. Used date validation yesterday-shift. Defaults Sys.Date().

title: Attempt to fix a malformed SMS — fix_sms
text: character vector length x, form "ID, DD-MM-YYYY, value", NA_character_ SMS fixed.

title: Attempt to fix a malformed SMS — fix_sms
text: Returns NA_character_ SMS unrecoverable (valid gauge ID, unparseable date, future date, older SMSCOLLECTR_MAX_AGE days). maximum SMS age can configured via environment variable SMSCOLLECTR_MAX_AGE: Fully vectorised — accepts character vector length.

title: Attempt to fix a malformed SMS — fix_sms

title: Check whether a string is a valid agrometeorological SMS — is_agro_sms
Check whether a string is a valid agrometeorological SMS — is_agro_sms
text: text character vector SMS strings check. NULL accepted returns logical(0).

title: Check whether a string is a valid agrometeorological SMS — is_agro_sms
text: logical vector length text.

title: Check whether a string is a valid agrometeorological SMS — is_agro_sms
code:
msg <- "DEDOUGOU
11-05-2026
Tn= 305
Tx= 438" is_agro_sms(msg)                          # TRUE #> [1] FALSE is_agro_sms("200001S, 03-06-2026, 125")   # FALSE #> [1] FALSE is_agro_sms(NULL)                         # logical(0) #> logical(0)

what: Check whether an SMS is malformed — is_bad_sms
title: Check whether an SMS is malformed — is_bad_sms
text: Validates SMS format-specific rules. valid gauge SMS exactly one line, station ID matching [0-9]{6}[PAC] numeric part exceeding 200166, date DD-MM-YYYY format future older SMSCOLLECTR_MAX_AGE days (default 3), value 1-4 digits, TR, "rain" mention.

title: Check whether an SMS is malformed — is_bad_sms
Check whether an SMS is malformed — is_bad_sms
text: x character string containing SMS text. gauge Logical. TRUE (default), validates via is_gauge_sms() rules. FALSE, validates via is_agro_sms().

title: Check whether an SMS is malformed — is_bad_sms
text: logical scalar. TRUE malformed, FALSE valid.

title: Check whether an SMS is malformed — is_bad_sms
text: maximum SMS age can configured via environment variable SMSCOLLECTR_MAX_AGE:

title: Check whether an SMS is malformed — is_bad_sms
code: is_bad_sms("200068P, 24-06-2026, 21")              # FALSE #> [1] TRUE is_bad_sms("200068P, 24-06-2026, TR")              # FALSE #> [1] TRUE is_bad_sms("200068P, 24-06-2026, 12mm")            # TRUE #> [1] TRUE is_bad_sms("200068P, 24-06-2026, pas de pluie")    # FALSE #> [1] TRUE is_bad_sms("200068P, 24-06-2026,")                 # TRUE #> [1] TRUE is_bad_sms("200286P, 24-06-2026, 21")              # TRUE — ID out of range #> [1] TRUE

what: Check whether a string is a valid rain gauge SMS — is_gauge_sms
title: Check whether a string is a valid rain gauge SMS — is_gauge_sms
text: valid SMS starts 6-digit station identifier followed one P, , C, comma (e.g. "200001S, 03-06-2026, 125"). Whitespace digits letter, letter comma, tolerated.

title: Check whether a string is a valid rain gauge SMS — is_gauge_sms
Check whether a string is a valid rain gauge SMS — is_gauge_sms
text: text character vector SMS strings check. NULL accepted returns logical(0).

title: Check whether a string is a valid rain gauge SMS — is_gauge_sms
text: logical vector length text.

title: Check whether a string is a valid rain gauge SMS — is_gauge_sms
code: is_gauge_sms("200001S, 03-06-2026, 125")   # TRUE #> [1] FALSE is_gauge_sms("200096 P, 01-07-2026, 67")   # TRUE #> [1] TRUE is_gauge_sms("hello world")                 # FALSE #> [1] FALSE is_gauge_sms(NULL)                          # logical(0) #> logical(0)

what: Parse a vector of SMS messages (all formats) — parse_sms
title: Parse a vector of SMS messages (all formats) — parse_sms
text: Detects format SMS message, dispatches appropriate parser, returns named list two tibbles — one per format. Malformed gauge SMS fixed via fix_sms() parsing.

title: Parse a vector of SMS messages (all formats) — parse_sms
Parse a vector of SMS messages (all formats) — parse_sms
text: texts character vector raw SMS strings. sent_dates Date vector length texts, giving date message received. Used validate shift SMS dates relative actual send time rather Sys.Date(). NULL falls back Sys.Date() every message.

title: Parse a vector of SMS messages (all formats) — parse_sms
text: named list two tibble::tibble() elements: gauge Parsed rain gauge observations columns eg_gh_id, year, month, day, time, eg_el_abbreviation, value, flag. agro Parsed agrometeorological observations columns. tibble empty (correctly typed) valid messages format found.

title: Parse a vector of SMS messages (all formats) — parse_sms
text: Supported formats: gauge Format — Rain gauge: "200001S, 03-06-2026, 125". agro Format B — Agrometeorological: multi-line [STATION]\n[DD-MM-YYYY]\nKey= val. Invalid unrecognised messages silently dropped. Duplicates (eg_gh_id, year, month, day, eg_el_abbreviation) keep last occurrence within tibble.

what: Read and parse SMS messages from a Google Sheet — read_sms
title: Read and parse SMS messages from a Google Sheet — read_sms
text: Reads raw SMS messages Google Sheet column, attempts fix malformed gauge messages via fix_sms(), parses valid messages structured observations via parse_sms(), returns named list parsed data, malformed rows, raw sheet.

title: Read and parse SMS messages from a Google Sheet — read_sms
Read and parse SMS messages from a Google Sheet — read_sms
text: sheet_url character(1). Full URL Google Sheet. sheet character(1) integer(1). Sheet name index. Default 1 (first sheet). col character(1) integer(1). Name index column containing SMS text. Default "sms".

title: Read and parse SMS messages from a Google Sheet — read_sms
text: named list four elements: gauge tibble::tibble() parsed rain gauge observations columns eg_gh_id, year, month, day, time, eg_el_abbreviation, value, flag. agro tibble::tibble() parsed agrometeorological observations columns. bad tibble::tibble() — raw sheet rows flagged review, extra bad_reason column explaining row flagged. Possible values: "malformed", "future date", "late submission", "old". raw tibble::tibble() — full raw sheet read Google Sheets, list columns coerced character. gauge agro empty correctly typed tibbles valid messages format found.

title: Read and parse SMS messages from a Google Sheet — read_sms
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ sms_auth() url <- get_sheet_url() result <- read_sms(url) result$gauge result$bad } # }

title: Store a Google Sheet URL in the system credential store — set_sheet_url

title: smscollectr 0.0.3
text: $bad now includes bad_reason column explaining row flagged: "malformed", "future date", "late submission", "old". fix_sms() gains sent_date argument (default Sys.Date()). Date validation yesterday-shift now relative actual received date instead system clock.

title: smscollectr 0.0.3
text: read_sms() parses raw$date per-message sent_dates passes parse_sms(), fix_sms(), .parse_sms(), date logic relative message received. date-anomaly gauge SMS now appear $bad: future body date, late submission (body < sent_date, within max age), -old submission (body < sent_date, beyond max age). parse_sms() accepts sent_dates argument (length texts) direct use outside read_sms(). sent_dates kept sync texts filtering steps, fixing silent index-misalignment bug assigned wrong sent_date messages appearing dropped SMS.

title: smscollectr 0.0.3
text: group_by(.data$col) restored — bare string arguments created phantom columns instead grouping existing ones, collapsing rows one via slice_tail(n = 1). dplyr::select() updated all_of(c(...)) replace deprecated .data$col usage inside select() (tidyselect ≥ 1.2.0). fix_sms() vectorised path now returns unnamed character vector (unname(vapply(...))), fixing test failure named vector comparison. .Rbuildignore merge conflict resolved; ^\.claude$ ^\.git$ added. DESCRIPTION description field trailing period added (R CMD check NOTE).

title: smscollectr 0.0.3
text: .parse_sms(), .parse_val(), .parse_agro_sms() marked @noRd — longer generate .Rd files appear public reference index. withr added Suggests test mocking. 8 new read_sms() tests (mocked via local_mocked_bindings) 4 new .parse_sms() date-rule tests.

title: smscollectr 0.0.2
text: Agrometeorological SMS support — read_sms() now returns $agro list element containing parsed agrometeorological observations alongside existing $gauge element. Two new helpers, is_agro_sms() .parse_agro_sms(), drive detection parsing 17-line agro format (Station / DD-MM-YYYY / Key= value × 15). config_auth() — new function save Google service account JSON key system keyring (config_auth("key.json")). subsequent sessions authenticate automatically without user interaction. set_sheet_url() / get_sheet_url() — store retrieve Google Sheet URLs securely via system keyring (macOS Keychain, Windows Credential Manager, Linux Secret Service). URLs never written disk plain text. to_station_id() / to_element_id() — lookup helpers translate raw SMS station codes element abbreviations canonical identifiers using internal reference table (R/sysdata.rda, built data-raw/lookup.R). is_no_rain() / is_bad_sms() / fix_sms() — additional predicates fixer function exported downstream use custom workflows. pkgdown website — automated GitHub Actions workflow (.github/workflows/pkgdown.yaml) builds deploys reference site every push master. Site available https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/.

title: smscollectr 0.0.2
text: read_sms() now filters non-numeric senders (keeps 226xxxxxxxxx-style numbers) parsing, reducing noise gateway messages. sms_auth() gained service-account-first auth path: keyring credentials present used automatically; OAuth fallback email supplied. .check_auth() now called lazily inside read_sms(), explicit sms_auth() call needed keyring credentials exist. parse_sms() returns named list list(gauge = ..., agro = ...) instead single tibble.

title: smscollectr 0.0.2
text: Fixed authentication regression gs4_auth() drive_auth() get sync switching credentials (#auth).

title: smscollectr 0.0.2
text: Added R/lookup-funs.R internal lookup helpers backed R/sysdata.rda. Added R/zzz.R package-load hooks. Removed docs/ static snapshot — site now built CI .

title: smscollectr 0.0.1
text: Initial release. read_sms() — read raw SMS Google Sheet column. parse_sms() — parse valid rain gauge messages tidy tibble. is_gauge_sms() — detect well-formed gauge SMS strings. clean_sheet() — remove processed rows source sheet. sms_auth() — authenticate Google Sheets (OAuth service account). set_sheet_url() / get_sheet_url() — store retrieve target sheet URL via system keyring.
